mapper.sql: select tas.id, tas.ter_sn, tas.alert_type, tas.sensor_type, tas.building_id, tas.floor_id, tas.create_time, tas.create_time as create_time_date, tas.create_time as create_time_time, tas.point_id, tas.del_flag, tas.deal_flag, tas.deal_time, tas.wifi_type, tg.wifi_ssid, tg.name gateway_name, bi.name as building_name, bfi.floor_name as floor_name, bfi.background_img_id, bfi.floor_length, bfi.floor_width, bpi.point_name as point_name, bpi.block, bpi.zone, bpi.zone_sub, bpi.point_y, bpi.point_x from ter_alert_system tas left join building_info bi on tas.building_id = bi.id left join building_floor_info bfi on tas.floor_id = bfi.id left join building_point_info bpi on tas.point_id = bpi.id left join ter_gateway tg on tas.ter_sn = tg.sn inner join sys_dept d on bi.dept_id = d.dept_id
mapper.insert:
insert into ter_alert_system
ter_sn, alert_type, sensor_type, wifi_type, building_id, floor_id, create_time, point_id, del_flag, deal_flag, deal_time,
#{terSn}, #{alertType}, #{sensorType}, #{wifiType}, #{buildingId}, #{floorId}, #{createTime}, #{pointId}, #{delFlag}, #{dealFlag}, #{dealTime},
mapper.select: select tas.alert_type as sensorType, count(1) as count from ter_alert_system tas left join building_info bi on (tas.building_id = bi.id) inner join sys_dept d on (bi.dept_id = d.dept_id) where tas.deal_flag = '0' ${params.dataScope} group by tas.alert_type
mapper.update:
update ter_alert_system set deal_flag = '1',deal_time = now() where id in
#{id}
